title: Watch: Explained: What is Euthanasia?
description: India’s Supreme Court has recognised passive euthanasia and the right to die with dignity, but the debate around assisted dying continues across the world. In this video, we explain what euthanasia means, the Harish Rana judgement in India, and the difference between active and passive euthanasia. The video also explores why end-of-life decisions are debated in law and ethics, and how different countries regulate assisted dying.
